title: Project Charter: Scholars @ Weill Cornell Medicine
summary: Project charter establishing business case, stakeholders, objectives, scope, and success criteria for replacing VIVO with a custom AWS-native scholar profile platform.
scope: AWS infrastructure (Fargate, RDS, CloudFront, Redis, Route 53, ACM)
notes: Manifest-declared PRD with precedence 9 (lowest). User explicitly downplayed this doc — they intend to be more ambitious than charter scopes. Where charter conflicts with HANDOFF or design spec, newer docs win. Capture business case, stakeholders, and scope-as-stated but treat as lowest-precedence baseline.
